# Langmuir Model

**Summary**: A model describing monolayer adsorption on a surface with a finite number of identical sites.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2009-al-khaldi|Al-Khaldi, 2009]] applied Langmuir models to characterize the adsorption capacity and intensity for both metals.

## Key Results and Findings

- The Langmuir model showed a better fit for As (III) with an R^2 of 0.998. ([[2009-al-khaldi|Al-Khaldi, 2009, p. 102]])
